creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

I just downloaded it from the master site and checked again, the
checksums do match the recorded checksums in distinfo.

- From the sizes of your files, you most likely downloaded the
development version of the documents rather than the release version.
You might have changed the Makefile, or used a make utility that
didn't expand the variables correctly.
Please make sure that numpy-ref.pdf and numpy-user.pdf are downloaded
from http://docs.scipy.org/doc/numpy-1.5.x/ rather than
http://docs.scipy.org/doc/numpy/ .  Thanks.

- -- llwang
